message:
🌱 Extract components from Clusters.tsx for refactoring

Phase 1 of Clusters.tsx refactoring:
- Extract utils.ts with helper functions and types
- Extract RenameModal component
- Extract StatsOverview component
- Extract FilterTabs component
- Extract ClusterGrid component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
